name: ELMYRA 2
subtitle: 4-Voice Microtonal Drone Synthesizer
summary: A 4-voice digital/analog hybrid drone synthesizer and platform for microtonal sonic exploration. Wavetable oscillator engine, 31 modulation targets, 41 patch points, polymetric sequencers, switchable multi-mode filter, delay, lo-fi reverb, and an analog OUCH distortion circuit. Available as a 42 HP Eurorack module or standalone desktop synth.
